summarization.a: The figure shows the concentration of O, Mn, Si, and Li at different depths for MnO₂
summarization.b: The figure shows the concentration of O, Mn, Si, and Li at different depths for 10cLi-MnO₂
summarization.c: The figure shows the concentration of O, Mn, Si, and Li at different depths for 50cLi-MnO₂
summarization.d: The figure shows the concentration of O, Mn, Si, and Li at different depths for 100cLi-MnO₂
summarization.e: The figure shows the concentration of O, Mn, Si, and Li at different depths  for 200cLi-MnO₂
summarization.f: The figure shows the concentration of O, Mn, Si, and Li at different depths for 300cLi-MnO₂.

e.question: Does the lithiation appear homogeneously over the whole substrate?

d.question: When does Lithium penetrate?
d.answer: In the samples 200cLi−MnO2 and 300cLi−MnO2, lithium is observed to penetrate throughout the whole film thickness.

a.question: Which figure corresponds to which sample?
a.answer:
The depth profiles correspond to the following samples
a. MnO2
b. 10cLi-MnO2
c. 50cLi-MnO2
d. 100cLi-MnO2
e. 200cLi-MnO2
f. 300cLi-MnO2

b.question: How is Lithium distributed across the films?
b.answer: The depth profiles reveal that lithium is distributed only in the top part of the film in the samples 10cLi−MnO2, 50cLi−MnO2, and 100cLi−MnO2, that is, when the average composition of the material is LixMn2O4, x ≤ 0.5. In the lithiated top parts of the films in these samples, the lithium concentrations were 0.6, 3.2, and 9.6 at. %, respectively.
